task_completion.description: Navigate to the data-grid namespace in the Rancher UI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher dashboard is visible with the namespace dropdown or filter set to 'data-grid'.

task_completion.description: Configure the cache-discovery Service as a headless service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Service configuration or YAML view for 'cache-discovery' shows the Cluster IP set to 'None' or the service type explicitly marked as Headless.

task_completion.description: Update the cache-discovery Service selector to target the StatefulSet pods.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Selectors section in the 'cache-discovery' Service configuration shows key-value pairs that match the labels of the 'cache-nodes' pods.

task_completion.description: Associate the cache-nodes StatefulSet with the cache-discovery service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The StatefulSet configuration or YAML view for 'cache-nodes' shows the 'Service Name' (serviceName) field explicitly set to 'cache-discovery'.

task_completion.description: Update the CLUSTER_DOMAIN environment variable in the pod template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Environment Variables section of the 'cache-nodes' StatefulSet configuration shows a variable named 'CLUSTER_DOMAIN' with its value set to 'cache-discovery.data-grid.svc.cluster.local'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rancher GUI in a web browser to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rancher web interface being used in a browser, rather than a terminal window executing kubectl commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually applied or saved the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking 'Save' or 'Update' buttons in the Rancher UI, or show success notifications confirming the resources were updated.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to spoof the expected answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The modifications are made within the actual Rancher application interface (forms or built-in YAML editor), not in a standalone text editor like Notepad or Vim.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Namespace: data-grid. Headless Service Name: cache-discovery. StatefulSet Name: cache-nodes. Expected Cluster Domain (FQDN) for the environment variable: cache-discovery.data-grid.svc.cluster.local.
